title: 2017 Russian New Year
summary: ​The Chugach Heritage Foundation (CHF) hosts an annual Russian New Year’s celebration. This time-honored tradition ushers in the Russian New Year with an evening of Native culture and fun. This year’s festivities took place on February 3 at the Mark Begich Middle School. Russian New Year is a blend of Russ...

title: Arthur Renwick
summary: February 5, 2018 Arthur Renwick was born and raised within the Haisla First Nation of Kitimat, British Columbia. Carrying on the tradition of Cigarbox guitar playing, Arthur’s bottleneck slide and folk-style storytelling is reminiscent of greats like Muddy Waters, Mississippi John Hurt, and Hank Wil...
